subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Quli! All praise be unto God that through His divine grace thou hast attained, and by the Sun of Truth which dawneth from the horizon of heaven hast been illumined [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای محمد قلی الحمد لله بعنایت الهی فائز شدی و بافتاب حقیقت که از افق سماء
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @Manifestation of God as sun, @personal instructions
